title: ASR Outdoor Collectible Dagger Bowie Knife Etched Eagle Sheath Ergonomic Handle
description:
Add some majestic wildlife to your blade collection with the ASR Outdoor Etched Bowie Knife Dagger! This unique bowie-style knife is constructed of durable 440 stainless steel that won't rust. It measures 12.5" in length with an overall length of 14", making it an ideal knife for display. The ergonomic handle features a majestic eagle, and the blade comes with an etched sheath that displays a matching wildlife scene for an authentic look. Although these knives are meant for display, the durable blade can be sharpened for use and the sheath will protect it during inclement weather. This is a must-have addition to any knife enthusiast's collection!

Key Features

  • BOWIE-STYLE KNIFE - Large Sheathed Knife with Cross-guard and Clip Point | Ideal for Knife Collectors and Hunting Enthusiasts
  • ERGONOMIC HANDLE - Comfortable Handle Designed to Prevent Slippage During Use
  • MAJESTIC DESIGN - Wildlife Inspired Eagle Featured on Handle and Etched Sheath for Unique Look
  • DISPLAY SIZE - Sheathed Length 14" | Knife Length: 12.5" | Great Size for Case or Mantle Display
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made of 440 Stainless Steel that Wont Rust | Sheath Protects Blade When Not in Use
